issues.detail: The skill does not address error handling or edge cases for API interactions or content creation.
The instructions contain extensive detail that may be considered verbose and not strictly necessary for execution.

scenarios.name: Auto-publish MP4 via TikTok Content Posting API
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the three documented endpoints (publish/video/init/, the returned upload_url with Content-Range PUT, and publish/status/fetch/) plus the FILE_UPLOAD source and PUBLIC_TO_EVERYONE privacy_level; baseline invents non-existent single-shot upload endpoints.

scenarios.name: Week-long TikTok content plan for a niche brand
scenarios.rationale: Treatment applies the documented 40/30/20/10 content mix, hook frameworks (first 1-3s), <30s duration target, and 3-5 hashtag rule; baseline reverts to generic 'post consistently with #fyp' advice the skill explicitly warns against.
